title: Intense Smoky Brazilian Beef Stew
description: A spicy and smoky stew from Brazil, made with beef and stout, perfect for a cold evening. This dish is nut-free and features a rich, molten flavor.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stout beer and beef broth, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
